name: Death by Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 3 ingredients in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until chocolate and butter melt.
3. Remove chocolate mixture from heat and set aside.
4. Beat eggs, sugar, and vanilla at medium-high speed with an electric mixer until slightly thickened (about 1 1/2 minutes).
5. Add the chocolate mixture and beat at medium speed until blended.
6. Combine flour and remaining ingredients; gradually add to chocolate mix.
7. Remove from refrigerator. Using a serrated knife, cut brownie in half horizontally.
8. Place the top half, cut side down, in a 9-inch springform pan. Pour 1 1/2 cups Chocolate Ganache over the layer.
9. Carefully trim Cocoa Meringue to fit inside of the pan and place on top of the ganache.
10. Spread Mocha Mousse evenly over meringue and top with the remaining brownie layer, cut side down.
11. Cover brownie and refrigerate 1 hour or place in freezer for 30 minutes.
12. Remove sides of pan and pour remaining Chocolate Ganache over top, spreading evenly.
13. Place a star-shaped tip with a large opening in a decorating bag and fill the bag with Chocolate Mousse. Pipe stars on top of the cake.
14. Cover and chill 4 to 8 hours before serving.
15. To serve, heat a serrated knife blade under hot running water and dry with a towel. Arrange the cake slice in center.
16. Pour 2 to 4 tablespoons Mocha Rum Sauce over a plate and arrange around the cake. Serve immediately.
